scripts.build: npm run build -w @jcst/shared && npm run build -w @jcst/server && npm run build -w @jcst/client
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @jcst/shared && concurrently -n server,client -c auto "npm run dev -w @jcst/server" "npm run dev -w @jcst/client"
scripts.test: npm run build -w @jcst/shared && npm run test -w @jcst/server && npm run test -w @jcst/client
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build -w @jcst/shared && npm run test:coverage -w @jcst/server && npm run test:coverage -w @jcst/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @jcst/shared && npm run typecheck -w @jcst/server && npm run typecheck -w @jcst/client
scripts.seed:admin: npm run build -w @jcst/shared && npm run seed:admin -w @jcst/server
scripts.seed:website: npm run build -w @jcst/shared && npm run seed:website -w @jcst/server
scripts.seed: npm run seed:admin && npm run seed:website && npm run seed:about
scripts.seed:website:force: npm run build -w @jcst/shared && npm run seed:website -w @jcst/server -- --force
scripts.seed:about: npm run build -w @jcst/shared && npm run seed:about -w @jcst/server
